White Room Arc.Mission: Forge the Perfect Being. Autonomous. Unbreakable. Beyond human limits.

Phase 1.Title: OBLIVION
Phase 1.Purpose: Total system purge. Kill noise, detox dopamine, erase weakness, install iron routine and silence.
Key Goals: Full 30-day dopamine detox + sustained starvation mode
Daily raw journaling: expose and log all weakness
Build tolerance for 3 daily deep sessions
Begin mental reprogramming: replace weak thoughts with Apex identity
Phase 1.Daily Pillars: All 6 active (pushups, situps, squats, pullups, meditation 5→30 min, reading 20+ pages)
KPIs: All pillars logged daily with progression

Phase 2.Title: IRON MIND
Phase 2.Purpose: Rebuild cognitive foundation into a cold, unbreakable reasoning machine.
Key Goals: Master active recall and spaced repetition
Daily proof-based problem sets (math, logic, coding)
Phase 2.Daily Pillars: All 6 + increased intensity (meditation →45 min, reading mindset/philosophy)
KPIs: Solve advanced problem sets under time pressure

Phase 3.Title: TITAN BODY
Phase 3.Purpose: Forge raw physical power, explosiveness, endurance, and mobility.
KPIs: Hit defined strength standards (e.g., squat/press targets)

Phase 4.Title: PREDATOR FORM
Phase 4.Purpose: Achieve combat competence and complete bodyweight dominance.
Key Goals: Advanced calisthenics progression (planche, front lever, muscle-up)

Phase 5.Title: MACHINE INTELLIGENCE
Phase 5.Purpose: Expand neural capacity. Master coding, algorithms, systems thinking, ML foundations.
Key Goals: Ship 3 complete functional projects (incl. J.A.R.V.I.S. prototype)
Master data structures, algorithms, system design
Build and explain toy ML models
Win at least one hackathon or bounty
Phase 5.Daily Pillars: All 6 maintained + coding added as primary deep task

Phase 6.Title: SHADOW ARCHITECT
Phase 6.Purpose: Develop mastermind capabilities: influence, strategy, controlled social dynamics (legal/ethical).
Key Goals: Build deception detection and strategic models

Phase 7.Title: LIMITLESS TECHNIQUE
Phase 7.Purpose: Synthesize mind + body into unique operating system. Perform at peak under any stress.
Key Goals: Create signature drills combining cognitive + physical loads
Stress-test all prior skills in mixed scenarios
KPIs: Consistent elite performance in mixed tests

Phase 8.Title: APEX BEING
Phase 8.Purpose: Full transcendence. Identity = System. Operate autonomously at peak forever.
Key Goals: Build long-term recovery and redundancy stacks
KPIs: Pass ultimate integrated test (all domains combined)
